what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links the design-source channel to an image asset located at image://design-source/presentation-15p/p-05.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata only, no body content
Target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/presentation-15p/p-05
standouts: Timestamped attachment record for design-source channel
conventions: Uses an image:// URI scheme for asset targets
Records an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
Separates attachment metadata from the actual asset content
notes: A lightweight, timestamped metadata stub that registers a presentation image asset as an attachment on the design-source channel.
questions: What is the actual visual/content of image p-05?
What is presentation-15p — a deck name, version, or folder?
Who or what process added this attachment?
How does this attachment relate to other slides or attachments in the same presentation?
apparent_themes: Separation of metadata from binary assets
intention_signals: The file appears intended to persistently record that a specific image asset (slide p-05 of a presentation) is associated with the design-source channel.
contribution: It contributes a durable, typed, timestamped link between a channel and a specific image asset, allowing a fused system to locate and retrieve the referenced presentation image within the design-source context.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file that registers an image asset at image://design-source/presentation-15p/p-05 under the design-source channel with an ISO timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record and preserve the association of a presentation image slide with the design-source channel.
